mapper.insert:
MERGE INTO NIC65B NIC65 USING (/* 영업일을 체크하여 월별 누적으로 매일 머지인투한다. */ SELECT CASE WHEN DATA_CCD = '11' THEN (SELECT MAX(SUBSTR(X.TAGT_DATE,1,6)) AS TAGT_YYYYMM FROM SID.IDO_A_UUE_INSN_CALENDAR X WHERE X.ENTY_ID = 1 /* 삼성증권 */ AND X.NEXT_BSNS_DATE <= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') AND X.HDAY_YN = 'N') ELSE '000000' /* 전일자료 */ END AS BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , SYSDATE AS CRT_DT , '000000' AS CRT_ENP , SYSDATE AS UDT_DT , '000000' AS UDT_ENO FROM ( SELECT '01' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* KYC */ , '11' AS DATA_CCD /* 고객위험등급 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '99' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 전체 */ , DECODE(C.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC C /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND B.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.ENTY_ID AND A.DEL_YN <> 'Y' --20240516 SHJ 원장데이터 정합성을 위해 추가 AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT C -- 계좌 WHERE C.ACNT_OWNR_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- RETAIL계좌를 가진 AND C.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE != 'CL' -- 폐쇄계좌가 아닌(정상계좌를 가진) ) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 --20240516 SHJ 원장데이터 정합성을 위해 추가 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD B WHERE B.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND B.RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND B.CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(C.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01','02')
UNION ALL
SELECT '01' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* KYC */ , '11' AS DATA_CCD /* 고객위험등급 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '99' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 전체 */ , DECODE(C.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , Y.DTBR_CODE AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC C /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_IRA_CUST_MGR X , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT Y WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID AND B.CLNT_ENTY_ID = C.ENTY_ID AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_UUA_ACNT C -- 계좌 WHERE C.ACNT_OWNR_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.ACNT_TYPE_CODE IN ('GNAC', 'FPAC', 'FOAC', 'SVAC') -- RETAIL계좌를 가진 AND C.ACNT_STAS_TYPE_CODE != 'CL' -- 폐쇄계좌가 아닌(정상계좌를 가진) ) AND X.DTLS_MNBR_ENTY_ID = Y.ENTY_ID AND X.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(C.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01','02') , Y.DTBR_CODE
UNION ALL
SELECT '01' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* KYC */ , '10' AS DATA_CCD /* 전일기준 고객위험등급 */ , A.DATA_DTIL_CCD AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , A.DATE_TEX_CCD AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 전체 */ , A.CUST_CCD AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , A.BRN_CD AS BRN_CD , A.CNT AS CNT FROM NIC65B A -- CDD WHERE A.BAS_YYMM = (SELECT MAX(Z.BAS_YYMM) FROM NIC65B Z WHERE Z.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND Z.DATA_CCD = '11') AND A.BIZ_RULE_CCD = '01' AND A.DATA_CCD = '11' )) NIC65_V ON ( NIC65.BAS_YYMM = NIC65_V.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = NIC65_V.BIZ_RULE_CCD AND NIC65.DATA_CCD = NIC65_V.DATA_CCD AND NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = NIC65_V.DATA_DTIL_CCD AND NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = NIC65_V.DATE_TEX_CCD AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = NIC65_V.CUST_CCD AND NIC65.BRN_CD = NIC65_V.BRN_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CNT = NIC65_V.CNT , UDT_DT = NIC65_V.UDT_DT , UDT_ENO = NIC65_V.UDT_ENO WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, BIZ_RULE_CCD, DATA_CCD, DATA_DTIL_CCD, DATE_TEX_CCD, CUST_CCD, BRN_CD , CNT, CRT_DT, CRT_ENP, UDT_DT, UDT_ENO) VALUES ( NIC65_V.BAS_YYMM, NIC65_V.BIZ_RULE_CCD, NIC65_V.DATA_CCD, NIC65_V.DATA_DTIL_CCD, NIC65_V.DATE_TEX_CCD, NIC65_V.CUST_CCD, NIC65_V.BRN_CD , NIC65_V.CNT, NIC65_V.CRT_DT, NIC65_V.CRT_ENP, NIC65_V.UDT_DT, NIC65_V.UDT_ENO)

MERGE INTO NIC65B NIC65 USING (/* 영업일을 체크하여 월별 누적으로 매일 머지인투한다. */ SELECT BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , SYSDATE AS CRT_DT , '000000' AS CRT_ENP , SYSDATE AS UDT_DT , '000000' AS UDT_ENO FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) AS BAS_YYMM , '03' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* CDD */ , '99' AS DATA_CCD /* 자료구분 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '01' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 01:신규 CDD 수행 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN C --CDD수행
WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' --CDD수행일자 AND C.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = '1' GROUP BY SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') UNION SELECT /*+ parallel(4) */SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) AS BAS_YYMM , '03' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* CDD */ , '99' AS DATA_CCD /* 자료구분 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) = SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '02' /* 02:도래자 CDD수행 */ WHEN D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE IS NULL THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) > SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ ELSE '04' END AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 04:미래건 CDD 수행 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN C --CDD수행 , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN D --이전 CDD재수행예정일자를 찾기위해 ,(SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , MIN(CDD_FLFL_SQNO) CDD_FLFL_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN WHERE CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' --CDD수행일자 GROUP BY CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) E --당월 가장빠른 CDD수행 WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND D.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = (SELECT MAX(X.CDD_FLFL_SQNO) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN X WHERE X.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND X.CDD_FLFL_SQNO < C.CDD_FLFL_SQNO) AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = E.CDD_FLFL_SQNO GROUP BY SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) = SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '02' /* 02:도래자 CDD수행 */ WHEN D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE IS NULL THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) > SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ ELSE '04' END /* 04:미래건 CDD 수행 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02')
UNION ALL /* 지점별 */
SELECT SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) AS BAS_YYMM , '03' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* CDD */ , '99' AS DATA_CCD /* 자료구분 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '01' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 01:신규 CDD 수행 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , Y.DTBR_CODE AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN C --CDD수행 , SID.IDO_A_IRA_CUST_MGR X , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT Y WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' --CDD수행일자 AND C.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = '1' AND X.DTLS_MNBR_ENTY_ID = Y.ENTY_ID AND X.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID GROUP BY SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') , Y.DTBR_CODE UNION SELECT /*+ parallel(4) */ SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) AS BAS_YYMM , '03' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* CDD */ , '99' AS DATA_CCD /* 자료구분 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) = SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '02' /* 02:도래자 CDD수행 */ WHEN D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE IS NULL THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) > SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ ELSE '04' END AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 04:미래건 CDD 수행 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , Y.DTBR_CODE AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN C --CDD수행 , SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN D --이전 CDD재수행예정일자를 찾기위해 ,(SELECT CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID , MIN(CDD_FLFL_SQNO) CDD_FLFL_SQNO FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN WHERE CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' --CDD수행일자 GROUP BY CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID) E --당월 가장빠른 CDD수행 , SID.IDO_A_IRA_CUST_MGR X , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT Y WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = D.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND D.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = (SELECT MAX(X.CDD_FLFL_SQNO) FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_CHAN X WHERE X.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND X.CDD_FLFL_SQNO < C.CDD_FLFL_SQNO) AND C.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = E.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND C.CDD_FLFL_SQNO = E.CDD_FLFL_SQNO AND X.DTLS_MNBR_ENTY_ID = Y.ENTY_ID AND X.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID GROUP BY SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE, 1, 6) , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) = SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '02' /* 02:도래자 CDD수행 */ WHEN D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE IS NULL THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ WHEN SUBSTR(C.CDD_FLFL_DATE,1,6) > SUBSTR(D.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) THEN '03' /* 03:미수행 CDD수행 */ ELSE '04' END /* 04:미래건 CDD 수행 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') , Y.DTBR_CODE )) NIC65_V ON ( NIC65.BAS_YYMM = NIC65_V.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = NIC65_V.BIZ_RULE_CCD AND NIC65.DATA_CCD = NIC65_V.DATA_CCD AND NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = NIC65_V.DATA_DTIL_CCD AND NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = NIC65_V.DATE_TEX_CCD AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = NIC65_V.CUST_CCD AND NIC65.BRN_CD = NIC65_V.BRN_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CNT = NIC65_V.CNT , UDT_DT = NIC65_V.UDT_DT , UDT_ENO = NIC65_V.UDT_ENO WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, BIZ_RULE_CCD, DATA_CCD, DATA_DTIL_CCD, DATE_TEX_CCD, CUST_CCD, BRN_CD , CNT, CRT_DT, CRT_ENP, UDT_DT, UDT_ENO) VALUES ( NIC65_V.BAS_YYMM, NIC65_V.BIZ_RULE_CCD, NIC65_V.DATA_CCD, NIC65_V.DATA_DTIL_CCD, NIC65_V.DATE_TEX_CCD, NIC65_V.CUST_CCD, NIC65_V.BRN_CD , NIC65_V.CNT, NIC65_V.CRT_DT, NIC65_V.CRT_ENP, NIC65_V.UDT_DT, NIC65_V.UDT_ENO)

MERGE INTO NIC65B NIC65 USING (/* 월초 1회만 집계 구축한다. */ SELECT BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , SYSDATE AS CRT_DT , '000000' AS CRT_ENP , SYSDATE AS UDT_DT , '000000' AS UDT_ENO FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM , '01' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* KYC */ , '12' AS DATA_CCD /* KYC 재이행 (당월) 도래 대상 건 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '99' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 전체 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND SUBSTR(A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02')
UNION ALL /* 지점별 */
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM , '01' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* KYC */ , '12' AS DATA_CCD /* KYC 재이행 (당월) 도래 대상 건 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '99' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 전체 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , Y.DTBR_CODE AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_IRA_CUST_MGR X , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT Y WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND SUBSTR(A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') AND X.DTLS_MNBR_ENTY_ID = Y.ENTY_ID AND X.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') , Y.DTBR_CODE
UNION ALL /* 당월 전 미처리 */
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM , '01' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* KYC */ , '13' AS DATA_CCD /* KYC 재이행 (당월 전 미처리) 도래 대상 건 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '99' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 전체 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND (SUBSTR(A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') OR A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE IS NULL) GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02')
UNION ALL /* 당월 전 미처리 지점별 */
SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') AS BAS_YYMM , '01' AS BIZ_RULE_CCD /* KYC */ , '13' AS DATA_CCD /* KYC 재이행 (당월 전 미처리) 도래 대상 건 */ , CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END AS DATA_DTIL_CCD /* 위험등급 */ , '99' AS DATE_TEX_CCD /* 전체 */ , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') AS CUST_CCD /* 고객구분 */ , Y.DTBR_CODE AS BRN_CD , COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD A -- CDD , SID.IDO_A_MAC_CLNT_ADDN_IFMN B -- 고객 , SID.IDO_A_UUF_CLNT_BSC B1 /* NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE */ , SID.IDO_A_IRA_CUST_MGR X , SID.IDO_A_UUE_SAMSUNG_DPRT Y WHERE A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID(+) AND A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = B1.ENTY_ID(+) AND TRIM(A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE) IS NOT NULL -- 위험등급이 존재하는 애들만 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM SID.IDO_A_MAH_CDD_FLFL_DTLD WHERE CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID = A.CDD_TAGT_ENTY_ID AND CDD_FLFL_DATE LIKE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM')||'%' AND RGBR_CODE = '21220' /* 연금전략팀 */ AND CRFL_FLTG_RSLT_CODE NOT IN ('1','2','3') /* 요주의필터링결과코드 */ ) AND (SUBSTR(A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE,1,6) < TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMM') OR A.CDD_RE_FLFL_XPCN_DATE IS NULL) AND X.DTLS_MNBR_ENTY_ID = Y.ENTY_ID AND X.CLNT_ENTY_ID = B.CLNT_ENTY_ID GROUP BY CASE WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'H' THEN '01' WHEN A.CLNT_RISK_RTNG_CODE = 'M' THEN '02' ELSE '03' END , DECODE(B1.NDVL_INSN_TYPE_CODE,'IN','01',NULL,'01','02') , Y.DTBR_CODE
)) NIC65_V ON ( NIC65.BAS_YYMM = NIC65_V.BAS_YYMM AND NIC65.BIZ_RULE_CCD = NIC65_V.BIZ_RULE_CCD AND NIC65.DATA_CCD = NIC65_V.DATA_CCD AND NIC65.DATA_DTIL_CCD = NIC65_V.DATA_DTIL_CCD AND NIC65.DATE_TEX_CCD = NIC65_V.DATE_TEX_CCD AND NIC65.CUST_CCD = NIC65_V.CUST_CCD AND NIC65.BRN_CD = NIC65_V.BRN_CD) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET CNT = NIC65_V.CNT , UDT_DT = NIC65_V.UDT_DT , UDT_ENO = NIC65_V.UDT_ENO WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( BAS_YYMM, BIZ_RULE_CCD, DATA_CCD, DATA_DTIL_CCD, DATE_TEX_CCD, CUST_CCD, BRN_CD , CNT, CRT_DT, CRT_ENP, UDT_DT, UDT_ENO) VALUES ( NIC65_V.BAS_YYMM, NIC65_V.BIZ_RULE_CCD, NIC65_V.DATA_CCD, NIC65_V.DATA_DTIL_CCD, NIC65_V.DATE_TEX_CCD, NIC65_V.CUST_CCD, NIC65_V.BRN_CD , NIC65_V.CNT, NIC65_V.CRT_DT, NIC65_V.CRT_ENP, NIC65_V.UDT_DT, NIC65_V.UDT_ENO)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SSQ.NIC65B WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{yyyymm} AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '04' --업무구분(04:TMS) AND DATA_CCD = '41' --자료구분(41:CTR)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SSQ.NIC65B ( BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , CRT_DT , CRT_ENP , UDT_DT , UDT_ENO ) SELECT BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , SYSDATE CRT_DT , 'Batch' CRT_ENP , SYSDATE UDT_DT , 'Batch' UDT_ENO FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '41' /* CTR */ AS DATA_CCD , '41' /* 적출건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , '9999' /* CTR:전체 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A, NIC75B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.DL_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6) UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '41' /* CTR */ AS DATA_CCD , '42' /* 보고건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , '9999' /* CTR:전체 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A, NIC75B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.DL_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL /* AND A.CTR_FWRD_TP_CODE = '1' */ AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6) UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '41' /* CTR */ AS DATA_CCD , '41' /* 적출건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , '9999' /* CTR:전체 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A, SSQ.NIC75B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.DL_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6), B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '41' /* CTR */ AS DATA_CCD , '42' /* 보고건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , '9999' /* CTR:전체 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A, SSQ.NIC75B B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND B.DL_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD = 'CTR' AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD IS NOT NULL /* AND A.CTR_FWRD_TP_CODE = '1' */ AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY SUBSTR(B.DL_DT,1,6), B.HANDLNG_BRN_CD )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SSQ.NIC65B WHERE BAS_YYMM = #{yyyymm} AND BIZ_RULE_CCD = '04' --업무구분(04:TMS) AND DATA_CCD = '42' --자료구분(42:STR)
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO SSQ.NIC65B X USING ( SELECT BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , SYSDATE CRT_DT , 'Batch' CRT_ENP , SYSDATE UDT_DT , 'Batch' UDT_ENO FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '41' /* 적출건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyy} || '%' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND INST_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), SSPS_TYP_CD UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '42' /* 보고건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyy} || '%' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), SSPS_TYP_CD UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '41' /* 적출건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , A.SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , B.MAX_BRN_CD AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , MAX(HANDLNG_BRN_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY DL_DT DESC, DL_SQ DESC) MAX_BRN_CD FROM SSQ.NIC75B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyy} || '%' AND (SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' OR SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'KYC%') GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyy} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.MAX_BRN_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), A.SSPS_TYP_CD, B.MAX_BRN_CD UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '42' /* 보고건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , A.SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , B.MAX_BRN_CD AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , MAX(HANDLNG_BRN_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY DL_DT DESC, DL_SQ DESC) MAX_BRN_CD FROM SSQ.NIC75B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyy} || '%' AND (SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' OR SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'KYC%') GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyy} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR','KYC') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.MAX_BRN_CD IS NOT NULL AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), A.SSPS_TYP_CD, B.MAX_BRN_CD ) ) Y ON ( X.BAS_YYMM = Y.BAS_YYMM AND X.BIZ_RULE_CCD = Y.BIZ_RULE_CCD AND X.DATA_CCD = Y.DATA_CCD AND X.DATA_DTIL_CCD = Y.DATA_DTIL_CCD AND X.DATE_TEX_CCD = Y.DATE_TEX_CCD AND X.CUST_CCD = Y.CUST_CCD AND X.BRN_CD = Y.BRN_CD ) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( X.BAS_YYMM , X.BIZ_RULE_CCD , X.DATA_CCD , X.DATA_DTIL_CCD , X.DATE_TEX_CCD , X.CUST_CCD , X.BRN_CD , X.CNT , X.CRT_DT , X.CRT_ENP , X.UDT_DT , X.UDT_ENO ) VALUES ( Y.BAS_YYMM , Y.BIZ_RULE_CCD , Y.DATA_CCD , Y.DATA_DTIL_CCD , Y.DATE_TEX_CCD , Y.CUST_CCD , Y.BRN_CD , Y.CNT , SYSDATE , 'Batch' , SYSDATE , 'Batch' ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET X.CNT = Y.CNT ,X.UDT_DT = SYSDATE ,X.UDT_ENO = 'Batch'

INSERT INTO SSQ.NIC65B ( BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , CRT_DT , CRT_ENP , UDT_DT , UDT_ENO ) SELECT BAS_YYMM , BIZ_RULE_CCD , DATA_CCD , DATA_DTIL_CCD , DATE_TEX_CCD , CUST_CCD , BRN_CD , CNT , SYSDATE CRT_DT , 'Batch' CRT_ENP , SYSDATE UDT_DT , 'Batch' UDT_ENO FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '41' /* 적출건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR') AND INST_ID IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), SSPS_TYP_CD UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '42' /* 보고건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , '99999' AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR') AND INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY SUBSTR(SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), SSPS_TYP_CD UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '41' /* 적출건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , A.SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , B.MAX_BRN_CD AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , MAX(HANDLNG_BRN_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY DL_DT DESC, DL_SQ DESC) MAX_BRN_CD FROM SSQ.NIC75B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND (SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' OR SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'KYC%') GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.MAX_BRN_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), A.SSPS_TYP_CD, B.MAX_BRN_CD UNION ALL SELECT SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6) AS BAS_YYMM , '04' /* TMS */ AS BIZ_RULE_CCD , '42' /* STR */ AS DATA_CCD , '42' /* 보고건 */ AS DATA_DTIL_CCD , A.SSPS_TYP_CD /* 룰번호 */ AS DATE_TEX_CCD , '99' /* 고객구분:전체 */ AS CUST_CCD , B.MAX_BRN_CD AS BRN_CD , COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM SSQ.NIC66B A , (SELECT SSPS_DL_CRT_DT , SSPS_DL_ID , MAX(HANDLNG_BRN_CD) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY DL_DT DESC, DL_SQ DESC) MAX_BRN_CD FROM SSQ.NIC75B WHERE 1 = 1 AND SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND (SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'STR%' OR SSPS_DL_ID LIKE 'KYC%') GROUP BY SSPS_DL_CRT_DT, SSPS_DL_ID ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT = B.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT AND A.SSPS_DL_ID = B.SSPS_DL_ID AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT LIKE #{yyyymm} || '%' AND A.SSPS_DL_CRT_CCD IN ('STR') AND A.INST_ID IS NOT NULL AND B.MAX_BRN_CD IS NOT NULL AND A.RPR_PRGRS_CCD = '99' GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.SSPS_DL_CRT_DT,1,6), A.SSPS_TYP_CD, B.MAX_BRN_CD )
